settings.title: What is Crafter’s Voice?
settings.content: This exclusive group will include crafters of all abilities, interests, and crafting habits. Your opinions are crucial to helping push us in the right direction so we’ve created this programme for you to let us know what we’re doing right, what we’re doing wrong, and everything in between.

settings.title: What information is required to join Crafter’s Voice?
settings.content: In order to join Crafter’s Voice you must complete an application which includes basic contact information, age, and craft habits. The questions included in the application allow us to ensure that the members selected for the group are not only reflective of global crafters but also helps us to make your Crafter’s Voice experience more valuable to you.

settings.title: What will I be required to do as a Crafter’s Voice member?
settings.content: Crafter’s Voice members will be invited to participate in surveys, quick polls and discussions about crafting, the experience as a customer of Crafter’s Companion, our products, and more. On occasion we may also invite you to attend virtual discussion groups. All activities are of course optional, but there is a minimum requirement to stay in the programme.

settings.title: How do I complete a survey?
settings.content: You will be emailed a unique URL address for each survey. Simply click on the URL included in the email or alternatively cut and paste the address into a web browser of your choice and complete the survey form online. Survey lengths will vary but will be monitored to minimize the use of your time.

settings.title: How do I join a virtual session?
settings.content: You will be emailed a unique URL address for each virtual session, which will take place via Google Meet. Simply click on the URL included in the email or alternatively cut and paste the address into a web browser of your choice. Session lengths will be communicated ahead of time and may vary from 30 minutes to an hour or more.

settings.title: What are the benefits of being part of Crafter’s Voice?
settings.content: In addition to the chance to communicate directly with the Crafter’s Companion team and have your voice heard, you will receive a quarterly gift voucher to spend on our website, special merchandise, a virtual profile picture badge you can display on your social media profiles, as well as occasional free products and special offers. To further show our appreciation for your input and feedback, you will automatically receive points for completing surveys, polls and virtual sessions. These points equate to different levels, each of which gets a different prize. Members will also be automatically entered into our Monthly Prize Draw. Please click here for full terms and conditions.

settings.title: Will my profile information be sold or shared?
settings.content: No. The information collected by the Crafter’s Voice programme is not sold or distributed to any company. All information is strictly confidential and privacy is guaranteed. Your name will never be sold, exchanged, or distributed to any other party without your express acknowledgement. See our Privacy Policy for complete details.

settings.title: How do I update my contact information?
settings.content: Send an email to craftersvoice@crafterscompanion.co.uk and the team will be happy to help.

settings.title: How will I know when to participate in surveys?
settings.content: As a Crafter’s Voice member, all you have to do is keep an eye on your inbox for survey invitations. We’ll invite you to participate in surveys and activities regularly. You are never obligated to participate, but there is a minimum requirement to stay in the programme.

settings.title: Who do I contact if I have questions or problems?
settings.content: Send an email to craftersvoice@crafterscompanion.co.uk and the team will be happy to help.

settings.title: How do I leave the programme?
settings.content: Send an email to craftersvoice@crafterscompanion.co.uk and the team will be happy to help.
